comments.author: @EdgeTalesDocs
comments.text: This documentary is absolutely stunning! The 4K visuals really brought the beauty of Panama to life. I was particularly moved by the sections on the Guna and Emberá cultures. For those who have visited or are planning to, which part of Panama surprised you the most?

comments.author: @stefanjordan4770
comments.text: I've been to Las tabalas for their carnival in February.  It's an experience.  Most cities had a party going on
